title: systemInfoResponse
description: Schema for systemInfoResponse in Nuix ECC REST API

eccVersion.description: The ECC version number of the ECC Server

osName.description: The name of the OS of the ECC Server

osVersion.description: The version of the OS of the ECC Server

osBitness.description: The bitness of the OS of the ECC Server, e.g. `64-bit`

memoryGB.description: The total physical memory of the ECC Server

NIC.description: array of network adapters on the ECC Server

Name.description: The network adapter system name, e.g. `eth3`

Display-Name.description: The network adapter display name, e.g. `Realtek USB GbE Family Controller`

IP-Address.description: The IPv4 address assigned to this network adapter

Volumes.description: array of volumes on the ECC Server

Type.description: The filesystem of this volume, e.g. `NTFS`

Free-Space.description: The total free space on this volume
